title: Create: Mind the Gap
description: Adds simple station sounds for Create trains.
body:
![MTG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c01ef9f65db1795feb95fb78a633ec7231998442.png)

Create: Mind the Gap is a small addon for Minecraft that expands the train system of Create Mod with simple station announcements. Inspired by the well-known phrase from the London Underground, it adds a subtle layer of immersion to your rail networks.

The mod introduces a few dedicated blocks that play announcement sounds at stations. They are easy to use, integrate naturally into existing Create setups, and can be customized to fit different stations.

Custom crafting recipes ensure everything fits into normal progression. The focus stays on keeping things lightweight while adding just enough detail to make stations feel more alive.
